fields.summary: HIJKL9012M - Portal login error after password reset
fields.description: Customer reset password but portal shows Authentication Failed on login.

analysis.summary: HIJKL9012M - Portal login error after password reset
analysis.description: Customer reset password but portal shows Authentication Failed on login.

comments.body: Session token not invalidated post-reset. Backend team cleared stale session. Login restored.
